drawDragConnectOverlay coverage 14→59 (was 0.65 ratio): added 45 tests pinning the canvas-drawing math at the formula level. Replicated toLocal coordinate conversion (offset before scale, DPR, retina case, pointer-outside-container negatives). Drawing-only constants (PORT_OFFSET_FACTOR=1.05 ports just outside circle, SUCCESS_ANIM_DURATION=600ms). Hover ports geometry (4 cardinal positions, only renders when !ds, pulse formula 0.6 + 0.4×sin(now/400), glow alpha 0.15×pulse, port alpha 0.7×pulse, white border at 1.5px DPR-scaled, returns needsNextFrame=true while ports visible, skipped when active drag suppresses hover). Bezier curve geometry (curvature = min(dist×0.25, 60×dpr), control points at 30%/70%, direction flip based on dx/dy magnitude — avoids self-intersect). Bezier dash animation (offset = -(elapsed/20)%20 backward flow, [8,5] pattern at 2.5px, red on invalid / teal on valid). Snap feedback (valid green ring #22c55e at 24px with rgba(34,197,94,0.25) glow at 8px and 1+0.06×sin(elapsed/250) pulse; invalid red X at 8px with red ring at 26px). Source-node pulse during drag (1+0.08×sin(elapsed/300), teal ring at 40% opacity 2px, 5px solid teal port indicator). Connect-to label pill (text fallback chain snap?invalid?reason:label : connectToLabel, Inter 11px DPR-scaled, +16px right -16px above cursor, red bg invalid / teal valid, white #fff text, textBaseline middle). Arrowhead geometry (12px length, ±π/6 tangent angle, color matches bezier). Success animation phase ordering (edgeProgress=min(progress×2,1) easeOut, node pulse <0.7, checkmark window (0.4, 0.7) fade-in (progress-0.4)/0.3, fade-out 1-(progress-0.7)/0.3, particle burst (0.3, 0.9) with 6 radial particles). Result: 74 files / 2953 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2953/2953 assertions pass; drawDragConnectOverlay's canvas math (bezier control points, dash flow, snap-feedback colors, success-animation phase boundaries) now formula-pinned
